lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Are the children coming out of the park or going into it?
lines.chinese: 孩子们是走出公园还是走进公园？
lines.raw: Are the children coming out of the park or going into it? | 孩子们是走出公园还是走进公园？

lines.english: This is a photograph of our village.
lines.chinese: 这是我们村庄的一张照片。
lines.raw: This is a photograph of our village. | 这是我们村庄的一张照片。

lines.english: Our village is in a valley.
lines.chinese: 我们的村庄坐落在山谷里。
lines.raw: Our village is in a valley. | 我们的村庄坐落在山谷里。
It is between two hills. | 它在两座山之间。

lines.english: The village is on a river.
lines.raw: The village is on a river. | 村庄在一条河边。

lines.english: Here is another photograph of the village.
lines.chinese: 这是村庄的另一张照片。
lines.raw: Here is another photograph of the village. | 这是村庄的另一张照片。

lines.english: My wife and I are walking along the banks of the river.
lines.chinese: 我妻子和我在河岸边散步。
lines.raw: My wife and I are walking along the banks of the river. | 我妻子和我在河岸边散步。
We are on the left. | 我们在左边。

lines.english: There is a boy in the water.
lines.raw: There is a boy in the water. | 水里有个男孩。

lines.english: He is swimming across the river.
lines.raw: He is swimming across the river. | 他正在横渡河流。
Here is another photograph. | 这是另一张照片。
This is the school building. | 这是学校教学楼。
It is beside a park. | 它在公园旁边。

lines.english: The park is on the right.
lines.raw: The park is on the right. | 公园在右边。

lines.english: Some children are coming out of the building.
lines.chinese: 一些孩子正从教学楼里出来。
lines.raw: Some children are coming out of the building. | 一些孩子正从教学楼里出来。

lines.english: Some of them are going into the park.
lines.chinese: 他们中的一些人正走进公园。
lines.raw: Some of them are going into the park. | 他们中的一些人正走进公园。
